name: West Haven Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dates, baking soda, and boiling water in a small bowl until cool to room temperature.
2. Sift together flour, cocoa, and salt; set aside.
3. Cream shortening and sugar in a mixing bowl using an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Blend in date mixture.
6. Stir in dry ingredients.
7. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees F until cake tests done, about 35 minutes.
9. Cool in pan on rack.
10. Cut into squares and serve with vanilla ice cream.
